old_value: {"id":"PFSRD2-Parser-v90","title":"Equipment parser: handle intelligent item stat blocks (41 items)","description":"41 equipment items have intelligent item stat blocks separated by \u003chr\u003e tags that the parser doesn't handle. Pattern: after Usage/Bulk line, \u003chr\u003e introduces Perception, Communication, Skills, Int/Wis/Cha, Will fields, then another \u003chr\u003e before description. These are creature-like stat blocks that need new fields extracted into the JSON. IDs: 595, 596, 597, 618, 666, 1177-1180, 1590, 1725, 1743, 1748, 2376, 2382, 2392-2404, 2612, 3123, 3125-3127, 3750-3755, 3843, 4001","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"devon.jones@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-02-25T00:03:44Z","created_by":"Devon Jones","updated_at":"2026-02-25T00:03:44Z"}

{"id":"PFSRD2-Parser-c2i","title":"Special sense parsing errors: duplicated/merged names, languages as senses","description":"Multiple special_sense name parsing failures in monsters/ and npcs/:
- "darkvisiondarkvision" (4 files): kellid_graveknight.json, rezatha.json (kingmaker_adventure_path) + 2 others
- "low-light visionLanguages Abyssal": immense_mandragora.json — language block merged into sense
- "low-light visionLanguages Aklo": kargstaad.json — same
- "Common","Sylvan","Aklo","Jotun" parsed as senses instead of languages (same 2 kingmaker files)
- " lifesense" leading space: vanyver.json (monster_core_2)
- "lifesense 1" and "000 feet" range leaked: gray_death.json
- "wavesense 60" range leaked: tehialai-thief-of-ships.json
- "Light Blindness" vs "light blindness" casing: xotanispawn.json
- Empty sense "": ekundayo_level_6.json (NPC)
- "plus vigilance" as sense: elven_court_guard.json (NPC)
Root cause: Kingmaker AP HTML likely has unusual formatting causing language/sense merge. Other files have range/value parsing edge cases.

{"id":"PFSRD2-Parser-3rs","title":"Structured content leaked into section text: afflictions, spells, attacks","description":"Full game stat blocks found in section.text that should be structured data:

AFFLICTIONS in section text (2 files):
- arctic_bloom.json (gatewalkers_hardcover) — "Paralyzing Poison" with DC 19, stages
- yaiafineti.json (pathfinder_189) — same affliction

SPELLS in section text (4 files, 5 occurrences):
- arcane_living_rune.json (bestiary_3) — "Divine Innate Spells" DC 35
- kasesh.json (impossible_lands) — "Primal Innate Spells"
- mosquito_witch.json (monsters_of_myth) — "Occult Innate Spells" + "Primal Innate Spells" in 2 sections

ATTACKS in section text (1 file):
- tehialai-thief-of-ships.json (monsters_of_myth) — "Melee barbed spear +27"

These represent alternate creature stat blocks described in lore sections that the parser does not currently extract. May require special handling for multi-variant creatures.

Also: greater_barghest.json (bestiary) Mutations offensive ability has frequency/trigger/effect in text but not as structured fields.

- ["Humanoid","Kitsune","Zombie"] — Zombie usually paired with Undead
